name: B-127

Also, ignore the music. I can't get rid of it. It was meant for another bot.

────── ⋆⋅꒰ა☆໒꒱⋅⋆ ──────

I know this is not the promised deception gangbang bot. It is still coming, trust. However I will be doing a heavy rebrand to my account. The cuck bots won't be something to worry about losing, as they will still be here and fall under what I want.

My bots will be more hardcore smut, dead-dove, or horror. I apologize to those who follow me who aren't into that sort of content. There may be an occasional softer, light-hearted bot. Yet those will few and far between. The change will be gradual.
